description: Estimate layer count and build reminders for crib stacks.
assumptions: Ground and base plates are stable.
warnings: Remove split or damaged cribbing from service.
Maintain full-contact load path and avoid uneven stacking.
stepTemplates: Use {layersRequired} layers per stack to reach approximately {estimatedHeightIn} in.
Base footprint is {baseFootprintFt} ft with {stackCount} stack(s).
Pattern reminder: alternate direction each layer and keep centers aligned.
Pause and inspect stack plumb/alignment before loading increases.

citationQueries.query: shoring operations guide cribbing lumber dimensions and stack stability
field guide building stabilization shoring cribbing patterns
